PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX psv: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/value/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?species ?speciesLabel(MAX(?amount) AS ?maxMass) WHERE {
  ?species wdt:P171 + wd:Q23501 .
  ?species rdfs:label ?speciesLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?speciesLabel) = "en")
  .
  ?species p:P2067 ?statement .
  ?statement psv:P2067 / wikibase:quantityAmount ?amountStr .
  BIND(xsd:decimal(?amountStr) AS ?amount)
  FILTER(BOUND(?amount))
}
GROUP BY ?species ?speciesLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?maxMass)
LIMIT 8
